sigWerNormalizedGold: 你 听 不 到 我 哦
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 你 听 不 倒 哦

sigWerErrors.reason: '到' (arrive/reach) and '倒' (fall/invert) are completely different words in Chinese and change the meaning of the sentence, making it incoherent.
Omitting '我' (I/me) removes the subject/object of the sentence, making the meaning incomplete and unclear.
